name: ClickUp
description: Project management platform. Manage workspaces, spaces, folders, lists, tasks, and comments with AI agent integration.

capabilities.name: list_spaces
capabilities.description: List spaces in a ClickUp workspace

capabilities.name: list_folders
capabilities.description: List folders in a ClickUp space

capabilities.name: list_lists
capabilities.description: List lists in a ClickUp folder

capabilities.name: list_tasks
capabilities.description: List tasks in a ClickUp list

capabilities.name: get_comments
capabilities.description: Get comments on a ClickUp task

capabilities.name: add_comment
capabilities.description: Add a comment to a ClickUp task

capabilities.name: list_time_entries
capabilities.description: List time entries for a ClickUp workspace
